creator: taob@io.org
text:
/usr/sbin/newsyslog segfaults if it does not find anything to
do in the /etc/newsyslog.conf file (e.g., if all the lines are
commented out).

Fix: 

No patches submitted at this time.
How-To-Repeat: 	Comment out all lines in /etc/newsyslog.conf and run
/usr/sbin/newsyslog.
